warnings.text: Person reaching dangerously close to rotating blade guard. Left hand within 15cm of hazard zone.
Hard hat slightly tilted, not fully secured. Minor PPE adjustment needed.
Person not wearing required safety goggles while operating grinding station.
Person leaning into conveyor belt zone. Immediate entanglement risk detected.
Two workers in close proximity near press brake. Insufficient clearance for safe operation.
Person climbing on racking system without fall protection harness.
Person standing slightly outside designated walkway. Minor positional deviation.
Welding operation detected without proper face shield. Arc flash exposure risk.
Person entered lockout/tagout zone while machine is energized. Immediate danger.
Forklift approaching pedestrian zone at excessive speed. Near-miss incident.
Safety signage partially obscured by stacked materials. Visibility reduced.
Person lifting heavy object with improper posture. High risk of back injury.
Chemical spill detected near workstation. Person not wearing chemical-resistant gloves.
Person caught between moving platform and fixed structure. Crush hazard imminent.
Ambient noise level exceeding 80dB. Hearing protection advisory.
Overhead crane load swinging near personnel. Exclusion zone not maintained.
Person operating forklift without seatbelt fastened. Moderate safety violation.
Emergency exit path partially blocked by pallets. Clearance below minimum width.
Electrical panel accessed without insulated gloves. Electrocution risk.
Gas leak detected in welding bay. Person still present without respiratory protection.
Scaffolding guardrail missing on second tier. Fall hazard for workers above.
Person using damaged power tool with exposed wiring. Shock and fire risk.
Safety shower not tested this week. Compliance check overdue.
Confined space entry without atmospheric monitoring. Oxygen deficiency risk.
Hot work permit expired 2 hours ago. Welding operation still in progress.
Person bypassed machine guard to clear jam. Hands inside pinch point zone.
Ladder placed on uneven surface at incorrect angle. Tip-over risk during use.
Compressed air being used to clean clothing. Injection injury hazard.
Structural crack detected on lifting beam during operation. Catastrophic failure risk.
First aid kit supplies below minimum count. Restocking required.
Dust extraction system running below rated capacity. Airborne particulate levels elevated.
Person standing in forklift travel lane while distracted. Unaware of approaching vehicle.
Fire detected near flammable storage cabinet. Suppression system not yet activated.
Toolbox left open on floor creating trip hazard. Housekeeping reminder issued.
